_comment: Equity forward template — copy to e.g. TRD_10009.json, fill required fields, then import. Do not import as-is.

product._product_id_comment: Pattern: FWD_EQF_{UNDERLYING}_{YYYYMMDD} (catalog EQF). Strike K in equity.strike, not in product_id.
product._contract_size_comment: OTC: 1 = one share per quantity unit. Options-style: use 100 and quantity in contracts.

equity._product_id_comment: optional — omit or null; defaults from product.product_id
equity._option_type_comment: must be null — no call/put; use legs[].direction long/short
equity._strike_comment: required number — forward price K per share

trade._status_comment: optional — import always writes PENDING until --price-booking

legs._direction_comment: long = bought forward, short = sold forward
legs._execution_price_comment: null → 0 until booking pricer on trade_date
legs._commission_comment: optional flat total — used only if commission_per_contract omitted
